description: Professional law career library covering major legal professions and specializations.

careers.name: Lawyer
careers.overview: Lawyer is a legal profession focused on interpreting laws, protecting rights, resolving disputes and providing legal guidance.
careers.whyChoose: Strong professional prestige, intellectual challenge, diverse career paths and significant societal impact.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 from any stream followed by an integrated law degree or graduation followed by LLB.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 → CLAT/AILET/LSAT → BA LLB/BBA LLB/BCom LLB or Graduation → LLB → Practice/Higher Studies.
careers.workEnvironment: Courts, law firms, corporate legal departments, government agencies, NGOs and consulting firms.
careers.futureScope: Growing demand due to regulatory complexity, corporate governance, cyber law and intellectual property matters.
careers.aiImpact: AI will assist research and documentation, but legal reasoning, advocacy and negotiation remain human-driven.

careers.name: Constitutional Lawyer
careers.overview: Specializes in constitutional law and citizens' rights.
careers.whyChoose: Prestigious legal specialization with policy impact.
careers.eligibility: 10+2 + Law Degree
careers.educationPath: BA LLB/LLB → Constitutional Law
careers.workEnvironment: Courts, Government, Academia
careers.futureScope: Strong
careers.aiImpact: Research assistance only

careers.name: Environmental Lawyer
careers.overview: Environmental Lawyer is a legal career focused on rights, justice, regulation, advisory work, contracts and dispute resolution.
careers.whyChoose: Environmental Lawyer offers intellectual challenge, public impact, strong professional identity and wide specialization options.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 for integrated law programs or graduation for 3-year LL.B.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 -> Law entrance -> BA LL.B./BBA LL.B. or LL.B. -> Internship -> Practice or specialization.
careers.workEnvironment: Courts, law firms, corporate legal teams, government departments, NGOs and policy organizations.
careers.futureScope: Strong due to corporate regulation, technology law, compliance, disputes and policy needs.
careers.aiImpact: AI will help with research and drafting, while argument, judgement, client strategy and ethics remain human-led.
